graphql-webclient/src/main/java/com/exam.general_idea: Migrate WebSocket client creation from the deprecated HttpClient API to the dedicated WebSocketClient API introduced in Vert.x 4.5.
graphql-webclient/src/main/java/com/exam.why_exists: The method `HttpClient.webSocket(String)` was removed in Vert.x 4.5, causing a compilation error if not replaced with `WebSocketClient.connect(String)`.
graphql-webclient/src/main/java/com/exam.before: var options = new HttpClientOptions() ... var httpClient = vertx.createHttpClient(options); httpClient.webSocket("/graphql")
graphql-webclient/src/main/java/com/exam.after: var options = new WebSocketClientOptions() ... var webSocketClient = vertx.createWebSocketClient(options); webSocketClient.connect("/graphql")

graphql-webclient/src/main/java/com/exam.general_idea: Update import statement to use the new WebSocketClientOptions class instead of HttpClientOptions.
graphql-webclient/src/main/java/com/exam.why_exists: The class `WebSocketClientOptions` is required for the new API and was not imported in the previous version.

graphql-webclient/src/main/java/com/exam.general_idea: Rename the timeout configuration method to match the new WebSocketClientOptions API.
graphql-webclient/src/main/java/com/exam.why_exists: The method `setWebSocketClosingTimeout` does not exist on `WebSocketClientOptions`; the correct method is `setClosingTimeout`.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/M.general_idea: Update DataInitializer instantiation to accept PgPool instead of individual repositories.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/M.why_exists: Compile error: constructor signature mismatch for DataInitializer.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/M.general_idea: Replace deprecated GraphQL Java PropertyDataFetcher with the new API.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/M.why_exists: Compile error: VertxPropertyDataFetcher class removed or deprecated in newer graphql-java version.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/M.general_idea: Migrate PgPool creation to the generic Pool API.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/M.why_exists: Compile error: PgPool.pool method signature changed or removed in favor of Pool.pool in newer Vert.x version.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/M.before: PgPool pool = PgPool.pool(vertx, connectOptions, poolOptions); return pool;

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/M.general_idea: Update GraphQLHandler to use beforeExecute for DataLoaderRegistry injection.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/M.why_exists: Compile error: dataLoaderRegistry method removed from GraphQLHandler builder in newer Vert.x version.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/M.general_idea: Change pgPool method return type from PgPool to Pool.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/M.why_exists: Compile error: Return type mismatch with updated Pool API usage.
Compile error: Cannot resolve symbol PropertyDataFetcher.
Compile error: Cannot resolve symbol Pool.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.general_idea: Update the exception handler to use the new asynchronous API introduced in graphql-java 21.0.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.why_exists: The method 'onException' was removed in graphql-java 21.0; code fails to compile with 'method not found' error.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.general_idea: Wrap synchronous result in CompletableFuture to match new return type.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.why_exists: The method signature now requires a CompletableFuture return type; returning a plain object causes a compile error.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.general_idea: Update delegate call to use the new handleException method name.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.why_exists: The method 'onException' was removed from SimpleDataFetcherExceptionHandler; code fails to compile with 'method not found' error.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.general_idea: Add import for CompletableFuture required by the new method signature.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.why_exists: The class uses CompletableFuture but lacks the import; code fails to compile with 'cannot find symbol' error.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.general_idea: Replace VertxDataFetcher wrapper with standard DataFetcher returning CompletionStage for getAllPosts.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.why_exists: Compile error: VertxDataFetcher class may be removed or deprecated in newer Vert.x versions, or API signature mismatch.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.general_idea: Replace VertxDataFetcher wrapper with standard DataFetcher returning CompletionStage for getPostById.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.why_exists: Compile error: VertxDataFetcher class may be removed or deprecated in newer Vert.x versions, or API signature mismatch.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.general_idea: Replace VertxDataFetcher wrapper with standard DataFetcher returning CompletionStage for createPost.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.why_exists: Compile error: VertxDataFetcher class may be removed or deprecated in newer Vert.x versions, or API signature mismatch.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.general_idea: Replace VertxDataFetcher wrapper with standard DataFetcher returning CompletionStage for addComment.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.why_exists: Compile error: VertxDataFetcher class may be removed or deprecated in newer Vert.x versions, or API signature mismatch.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.general_idea: Replace Vert.x-specific GraphQL DataLoader wrappers with standard Dataloader library interfaces to align with modern Vert.x 4.5+ patterns.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.why_exists: The classes `VertxBatchLoader` and `VertxMappedBatchLoader` are removed or deprecated in newer Vert.x versions, causing compilation errors if used.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.general_idea: Refactor authorsLoader to use anonymous BatchLoaderWithContext implementation returning CompletionStage.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.why_exists: The old VertxBatchLoader.create() API is no longer available, requiring a switch to the standard DataLoaderFactory and BatchLoaderWithContext interface.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.general_idea: Refactor commentsLoader to use anonymous MappedBatchLoaderWithContext implementation returning CompletionStage.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.why_exists: The old VertxMappedBatchLoader.create() API is no longer available, requiring a switch to the standard DataLoaderFactory and MappedBatchLoaderWithContext interface.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/s.general_idea: Add null check before calling toString() on authorId to prevent NullPointerException.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/s.why_exists: Runtime NullPointerException if authorId is null
